nasb.text: But they fell on their faces and said, “O God, God of the spirits of all flesh, when one man sins, will You be angry with the entire congregation?”

esv.text: And they fell on their faces and said, “O God, the God of the spirits of all flesh, shall one man sin, and will you be angry with all the congregation?”

cnv.text: 摩西和亞倫就俯伏在地，說：“　神啊，萬人之靈的　神啊，一人犯罪，你就要向全體會眾發怒嗎？”

ccb.text: 摩西和亚伦就伏在地上说：“上帝啊，赐人生命的上帝啊！一人犯罪，你就要向全体会众发怒吗？”
